description_long: This is a small, rectangular brick bank building with a pitched, orange-tiled roof and stone corner accents. The front features a single wooden door framed by white stone, a small green mailbox, a bottle on a ledge, and a green drainpipe running down the left side. The side walls are constructed of red and white bricks, with one side displaying a large arched window with a wooden frame and mesh, and the other side featuring a barred window and a set of double cellar doors. The rear of the building is plain, with a bricked-up lower section and a small wooden crate nearby. The structure sits on a stone foundation, and the overall appearance is reminiscent of traditional European or Mediterranean commercial architecture. No visible signage or branding is present, and the building is compact, likely intended for a small neighborhood bank branch.
description: A compact brick bank building with a tiled roof, stone accents, a single wooden door, barred windows, and a green drainpipe, evoking a traditional European style.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the bank with a large arched window, stone accents, and a small platform with a green lamp.
description_view_1: The rear view reveals a plain brick wall with a bricked-up lower section and a wooden crate to the side.
description_view_2: This side displays a barred window, a green drainpipe, and double cellar doors at the base.
description_view_3: The front view highlights the main entrance with a single wooden door, a green mailbox, a bottle on a ledge, and the drainpipe.
attribute_entrance_design: Single wooden door framed by white stone, with a green mailbox and a small bottle on a ledge; the entrance is simple and rectangular with no decorative glass or revolving/sliding mechanism.
